creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Sep  8 03:26:09 2012
New Revision: 303861
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303861

Log:
  - Update to 0.82
  
  PR:		ports/170928

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/Makefile
  head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 03:14:37 2012	(r303860)
+++ head/net/p5-Daemon-Generic/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 03:26:09 2012	(r303861)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Daemon-Generic
-PORTVERSION=	0.71
+PORTVERSION=	0.82
 CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,13 +14,18 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Framework to provide start/stop/reload for a daemon
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-File-Flock>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Flock \
-		p5-File-Slurp>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Slurp
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-File-Flock>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Flock \
+		p5-File-Slurp>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Slurp \
+		p5-AnyEvent>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-AnyEvent \
+		p5-Event>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Event \
+		p5-Eval-LineNumbers>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Eval-LineNumbers
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=	Daemon::Generic.3 \
 	Daemon::Generic::Event.3 \
-	Daemon::Generic::While1.3
+	Daemon::Generic::While1.3 \
+	Daemon::Generic::AnyEvent.3
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
